name: @academorix/authorization
description: Turborepo shim for the PHP `academorix/authorization` package. Ships attribute-driven controller authorization (`#[RequirePermission]`, `#[RequireRole]`, ...) with a reflection-cached middleware. NOTE: composer install is exposed as `install:composer` — never plain `install` — so pnpm's lifecycle does not run it during a root `pnpm install`.
